summary: Strong cycle. Merged PR #1168 (graceful SQLite fallback — all 5 CI checks green). Closed issues #1144 (better-sqlite3 NODE_MODULE_VERSION mismatch on Node 22) and #1148 (worktree SQLite fatal crash) — both addressed by #1168's graceful fallback. Closed superseded PR #1158 (HQ EM fix; storage portion already merged via #1152; go-fast-path chmodSync no longer blocking since #1142 closed). Requested rebase on PR #1153 (heredoc false-positive fix for #1119). Sprint issues #1118, #1142, #955, #1144, #1148 all CLOSED. Only #1119 remains (PR #1153 one rebase away). 4364 tests passing.

prs.title: fix(matchers): strip heredoc bodies before destructive pattern scanning
prs.note: CI failure was storage migration regression (fixed by #1152 merged 02:34Z). Commented on PR requesting rebase. Expected to pass CI after rebase.

mergedThisCycle.title: fix(guard): graceful SQLite fallback when native bindings unavailable
mergedThisCycle.note: Aligns guard.ts with hook commands (claude-hook, copilot-hook) that already had graceful SQLite fallback.

closedThisCycle.title: fix(ci): patch sqlite-migrations v5 assertion + go-fast-path chmodSync
closedThisCycle.note: Superseded: storage fix already in #1152 (merged 02:34Z); CONFLICTING + CI failing; go-fast-path issue closed upstream.

closedThisCycle.title: Governance runtime crashes with better-sqlite3 NODE_MODULE_VERSION mismatch on Node 22
closedThisCycle.note: Addressed by PR #1168 graceful fallback — crash path eliminated. Root cause (stale npx cache binaries) is distribution-level.

closedThisCycle.title: Governance runtime fails to start in worktrees — better-sqlite3 native bindings missing
closedThisCycle.note: Closed by PR #1168 merge (auto-closed via 'Closes #1148' in PR body).

notableIssues.title: False positive: destructive command detection fires on report content mentioning blocked command patterns
notableIssues.label: priority:medium
notableIssues.note: One rebase away from done. Commented on PR. Next senior run should rebase fix/heredoc-false-positive-1119 on main and push.

testHealth.note: From QA run 2026-03-28T00:52Z. +14 tests vs prior run.

sprintStatus.remainingWork: PR #1153 rebase (closes #1119, heredoc false-positive in matchers)

escalationRules.notes: No escalation triggers. PR #1153 is a soft blocker (needs rebase) — not a hard block on squad health.

dogfoodObservations.description: Shell working directory resets to worktree root between Bash calls — had to use explicit bash -c 'cd ...' pattern for gh commands in agent-guard subdir.
